beliefs.belief: Engaging in physical activity, even when imperfect, leads to increased energy and positive mood.
beliefs.evidence: Feeling energized and ready to tackle the day!

beliefs.belief: Socializing and having external accountability enhances personal motivation and goal achievement.
beliefs.evidence: It’s nice to have a mix of health and social time!

beliefs.belief: Setbacks are temporary, and I have the resilience to restart my positive habits.
beliefs.evidence: I’ll try to roll out my mat and do something light.

beliefs.belief: I must be proactive and consistent in creating my own routines to achieve my goals.

downstream_scores.dominant_theme: Establishing and maintaining a sustainable wellness routine through social support
downstream_scores.suggested_follow_up: Given how motivated you sound now, what small reward do you feel you’ve earned for sticking to your new routine this week?
